SceneContext: Dr. Chronos left a bomb with a fake time word. Fix the sentence to stop it:
WrongSentence: The mission briefing is on tomorrow.
BombDefuseHint: tomorrow 前面不加任何介係詞！刪掉 on！
Explanation: this / that / next / last / every / today / tomorrow / yesterday 這類字前面不加 in/on/at，直接使用。❌ on tomorrow → ✅ tomorrow

SceneContext: A fake paper shows the wrong date. Find and fix the mistake:
WrongSentence: Dr. Chronos escaped in last year.
BombDefuseHint: last 前面不加介係詞！刪掉 in！
Explanation: last year / last week / last month 前面直接使用，不加 in/on/at。❌ in last year → ✅ last year

SceneContext: A bad email has a trap. Fix it to continue:
WrongSentence: The time crystals will arrive at next week.
CorrectSentence: The time crystals will arrive next week.
CorrectPatterns: [Tt]he time crystals will arrive next week\\.
BombDefuseHint: next 前面不加介係詞！刪掉 at！
Explanation: next week / next month / next year 前面不加 in/on/at。❌ at next week → ✅ next week

SceneContext: The train boss's message was hacked. Take out the extra word:
WrongSentence: The train was delayed in this morning.
CorrectSentence: The train was delayed this morning.
BombDefuseHint: this 前面不加介係詞！刪掉 in！
Explanation: this morning / this afternoon / this evening 前面不加 in/on/at。❌ in this morning → ✅ this morning

SceneContext: A scary letter from Chronos has a grammar bomb:
WrongSentence: I will change the clocks at every day.
CorrectSentence: I will change the clocks every day.
CorrectPatterns: [Ii] will change the clocks every day\\.
BombDefuseHint: every 前面不加介係詞！刪掉 at！
Explanation: every day / every week / every year 前面不加 in/on/at。❌ at every day → ✅ every day

SceneContext: The camera paper is wrong. Fix the sentence:
WrongSentence: He broke into the station on today.
CorrectSentence: He broke into the station today.
BombDefuseHint: today 前面不加介係詞！刪掉 on！
Explanation: today / tonight / tomorrow 前面直接使用，不加 in/on/at。❌ on today → ✅ today

SceneContext: A time hole opens with a wrong rule. Fix the sentence to close it:
WrongSentence: The thief stole the calendar in last night.
CorrectSentence: The thief stole the calendar last night.
CorrectPatterns: [Tt]he thief stole the calendar last night\\.
BombDefuseHint: last 前面不加介係詞！刪掉 in！
Explanation: last night / last Friday 前面不加 in/on/at。❌ in last night → ✅ last night

SceneContext: The last bomb is ticking! Fix the last mistake in the timeline:
WrongSentence: We must stop him on this weekend!
CorrectSentence: We must stop him this weekend!
BombDefuseHint: this 前面不加介係詞！刪掉 on！
Explanation: this weekend / this week 前面不加 in/on/at。❌ on this weekend → ✅ this weekend
